## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (English subject, imperative, ≤72 chars)
- [ ] No direct commits to `main` — this PR targets `main` from a feature branch
- [ ] If a command prompt changed, the relevant `docs/` rationale still holds
- [ ] If the version changed, the tag and `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` are in sync
- [ ] Public-facing docs are in English
